Off Calendar Nov-30-2009 Text Ruling

MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-09-492725 WITH CASE CGC-09-492524
Off Calendar Nov-25-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPELLANT FERAT INC. MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-09-492725 WITH CASE CGC-09-492524 FOR ALL PURPOSES. Appearances: Anne Hipshman, Esq. Dept. of Industrial Relations, (415) 703-4863 appearing for Respondent Sabri Ozel and opposing party. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: The motion to consolidate is denied. The different procedural posture of the two cases requires that they be tried separately. Order signed in open Court.(302/HEK)Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR # 5797
